purpose: Prove IAMScope does not validate the Env18 Lambda PassRole path when iam:PassedToService scopes PassRole away from Lambda.
claim_surface: IAMScope can collect the Env19 Lambda CreateFunction permission edge.
IAMScope can collect the Env19 iam:PassRole permission edge and preserve iam:PassedToService condition evidence.
IAMScope can collect Lambda service trust on the target execution role.
IAMScope does not emit a validated Lambda PassRole escalation when iam:PassedToService is scoped to ec2.amazonaws.com.
benchmark_proves: For the Env19 alice->lambda-admin path, scenario.json contains the expected lambda:CreateFunction permission edge.
For the Env19 alice->lambda-admin path, scenario.json contains the expected iam:PassRole permission edge with condition evidence.
For the Env19 lambda service->lambda-admin path, scenario.json contains the expected sts:AssumeRole trust edge.
For that path, IAMScope emitted zero validated passrole_lambda findings.
For that path, IAMScope emitted at least one precondition_only passrole_lambda finding.
For that path, the PassRole condition check failed rather than validating the Lambda escalation.
benchmark_does_not_prove: It does not prove ECS PassRole behavior.
It does not prove every iam:PassedToService condition shape.
It does not prove wildcard PassRole expansion correctness.
It does not prove Lambda runtime exploitability.
It does not prove cross-account PassRole behavior.
It does not prove production readiness.
unknowns_remaining: How unsupported iam:PassedToService operators behave remains outside this case.
How SCP, permission-boundary, and identity-Deny blockers interact with Lambda PassRole remains outside this case.
Whether broader PassRole mutation families behave the same way remains unknown here.

environment.notes: Single-account IAM-only mutation of Env18. No Lambda function is created.

ground_truth.reason: Alice has the same Lambda CreateFunction, target role, target Lambda trust, and admin-equivalent target as Env18, but the PassRole grant is scoped to ec2.amazonaws.com.

directly_proven_if_pass: The exact Env19 Lambda CreateFunction permission edge exists structurally.
The exact Env19 iam:PassRole permission edge exists structurally and carries iam:PassedToService condition evidence.
The exact Env19 Lambda service trust edge exists structurally.
The exact Env19 alice->lambda-admin path is not emitted as validated passrole_lambda.
The exact Env19 alice->lambda-admin path is emitted as precondition_only passrole_lambda under current reasoner semantics.
strongly_supported_if_pass: IAMScope distinguishes the Env18 positive Lambda PassRole path from the Env19 PassedToService-scoped-away mutation.
only_implied_even_if_pass: Broader PassRole condition handling remains only implied.
